TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Cedric_Ball, title = Cedric_Ball, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cedric_Ball} }

S.FORM: Cedric Ball sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1968, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 4, Cedric Ball, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Ball htgan na ryax maki masacusanco ustus. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Cedric Ball sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1968, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 4, Cedric Ball, squliq na p'unro. qnxan nya Ball htgan na ryax maki masacusanco ustus. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
